package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_newreplacer_per_call: `strings.NewReplacer(...)` recreated on request or loop paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario660Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
